name: Passthrough
description: Piezo input straight to stereo output. Minimal patch for verifying signal path.

name: Exciter
description: Piezo through a lowpass filter into the on-board exciter speaker. Pot1=cutoff.

name: Delay
description: Piezo into stereo delay. Bank 1: time, feedback, pingpong, mix. Btn1=freeze.

name: SD Recorder
description: Piezo into AudioRecorder writing 24-bit WAVs to SD. Btn1=record, Btn2=play, Btn3/4=prev/next file.

name: Trigger Synth
description: Piezo strikes trigger an ADSR-shaped wavetable osc. LFO + Scale wander the pitch. Bank 1: A/D/S/R.

name: PortaSampler
description: Piezo records into PortaSampler. StepSequencer gates 1-4 trigger slots in a 16-step pattern.

name: Granular Contact Mic
description: Piezo into granular synthesis with freeze and reverse
